title: clusia sphaerocarpa
intro: Clusia sphaerocarpa, also known as the ball-bearing tree or round-fruited clusia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clusia sphaerocarpa include relief from fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin infections. Clusia sphaerocarpa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
